label: LEAGUE_REBOUND_ATTACK_FRAMEWORK_V1

anchor_big_boost.description: Boost true center/PF rebound overs when interior stability, rim-miss support, and rebound concentration are present.
signals: opponent weak rim finishing or high OREB allowed

long_rebound_chaos.description: Flag teams creating long-miss, wing/guard rebound volatility.

shared_tree_risk.description: Downgrade individual overs when team rebound success is distributed across multiple viable rebound owners.
signals: strong team REB without strong box-out concentration

opponent_rebound_leak.description: Identify teams leaking opponent rebound volume.

no_bet_zone.description: Stand-down flag when volume exists but ownership is too flat to trust.
signals: 3+ realistic rebound owners within same game tree

locked_rules: upgrade halftime under pivots when anchor share is visibly suppressed
downgrade overs in long-rebound chaos environments unless player is true anchor
replacement-minute boosts require rebound ownership proof, not just vacant minutes
if 3+ viable rebound owners sit within the same game tree, classify as NO_BET_ZONE
slate_scan_order: 1. Check opponent rebound leak + box-out weakness
2. Check team miss profile and long-rebound chaos
3. Check anchor ownership vs shared-tree risk
4. Approve only 2-leg core builds unless all legs grade A or better
5. Prefer anchor overs or halftime unders over fragile secondary overs
